name: TileGame (Godot Game Jam)
description: 3D turn-based tile exploration game built in Godot 4.6 with Forward Plus rendering, shipped as a Windows PC build.

bullets.text: Shipped a playable Windows PC build of a 3D turn-based tile game in a game jam, by Godot 4.6 Forward Plus rendering and Jolt Physics.
Implemented a 3D orbit camera with zoom and keyboard rotation around a character pivot, by mouse-wheel and key bindings for tile-based exploration.
Built a fog-of-war visual system with tweened Sprite3D billboards, revealing map tiles as the player explored the 3D turn-based world.
Generated unique placeholder art for 100+ card resources in-editor, by an integrated @tool script assigning procedural textures directly to card data assets.
Built turn-based tile gameplay with registry, tweened movement, and enemy spawning, by Godot scene scripts coordinating exploration and fog-of-war visibility.
